title: Eva2 intro
wikitext:
[]: Eva2 intro             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Nov 25, 2005 4:09 pm Video (18 megs). Can anyone confirm if this is legit? 'Tseems so, but you can never be sure enough.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Nov 25, 2005 8:07 pm Yes, I recall seeing that streamed off of the Eva2 page on Gainax's site a while back.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Nov 25, 2005 9:26 pm Thx!

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Nov 27, 2005 3:17 pm I found that incredibly hilarious. And for the life of me I can't explain why.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Nov 27, 2005 7:13 pm Cheesy CGI perhaps? Or perhaps the fact that today's sophisticated technology can't compete with hand drawn animation from 1995?

[]:             Quote Post by Punio4 » Mon Dec 05, 2005 10:36 am it has it's good sides... but it just looks too... artificial... dunno how to explain it... glossy textures, extra fluid animations... just looks... hell not right :P
